response.justification: A seasoned, versatile software craftsman with broad full-stack, embedded, and infrastructure experience spanning well over a decade, which satisfies the raw years requirement. However, this is a director-level AI strategy role demanding recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, deep cloud strategy, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers and inspire technical direction. The candidate's AI exposure is limited to recent, modest MCP/agent tooling work, there is no advanced AI degree or recognized AI track record, and the career trajectory is hands-on IC/staff engineering rather than principal-level strategic leadership. The gap on the central AI-strategy mandate outweighs the strong engineering breadth.
strengths: Very broad, long-tenured engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and high-throughput microservices
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev, plus open-source platform founding and conference talks
Some cloud and orchestration exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) and active community/knowledge sharing
concerns: Minimal demonstrated AI/ML expertise; no shipped AI products or platforms, no advanced AI degree
Career level reads as senior/staff IC, not the principal/director-level strategic leadership the role requires
Lacks evidence of advising strategic customers/partners or driving cloud/AI platform strategy
